And not trying to come off as hypocritical (and if I do forgive me). But Den Of Thieves came off as a one and done film, and it was perfect. This seems like a situation of cash grab, because they're really doesn't seem like a reason that a sequel should have been made, storyline wise. If it's a good movie, hey it's a good movie.
